name: @msqdx/persona-reality-spec
description: Persona Reality specs, schema, golden fixtures, WebXR client, and AUDION backend

scripts.test: npm run validate:schema && npm run validate:persona-inputs && npm run validate:persona-profile && npm run validate:act-blueprint && node scripts/test-act-blueprint.mjs && node scripts/test-persona-pipeline.mjs && node scripts/test-session-arc-compile.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run validate:schema && npm run test:backend
